description: A full-length portrait of a woman standing against an almost entirely black background. She wears a long black dress that merges with the darkness, a small black hat, and holds a pair of light-colored gloves in her hands. Her face is pale and finely rendered, the only point of bright tonality along with the white collar at her throat and the gloves. The figure emerges from the surrounding darkness with subtle gradations of near-black, the hem of her dress dissolving into a warm brown ground plane.
